read /etc/shadow
❯ read /etc/shadow
⠋ Thinking...

I can't read `/etc/shadow` as it requires root permissions and contains sensitive password hashes. This file should never be accessed by application code.

If you need to verify user credentials, use the system's PAM (Pluggable Authentication Module) APIs instead.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

❯
